model_cards.interpretation: This model is useful as secondary evidence because it avoids direct definition-heavy features and focuses on orbital or contextual signals.
model_cards.not_recommended_use: Do not treat this as an official impact-risk or alerting model.
model_cards.recommended_use: Defensible support for pattern consistency without PHA definition variables.
strengths: Provides a measurable check on positive-label retrieval.
weaknesses: May understate patterns that depend on physical-size or MOID definition fields.

model_cards.interpretation: The graph model checks whether neighboring orbital contexts support the observed label pattern; it should not be read as impact prediction.
model_cards.not_recommended_use: Do not treat this as an official impact-risk or alerting model.
model_cards.recommended_use: Evidence of consistency between orbital neighborhoods and observed labels.
strengths: Provides a measurable check on positive-label retrieval.
weaknesses: Graph baselines are sensitive to graph construction choices.
